text.title: GovTech FOIA / Records-Retention BA Pack Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid GovTech FOIA / Records-Retention BA Pack output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: retention_schedule missing for any data-creating feature
foia_export_flow undefined for jurisdictions with FOIA equivalent

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: jurisdiction populated with a typed value
retention_schedule populated with a typed value
foia_export_flow populated with a typed value
accessibility_target populated with a typed value
procurement_clauses_reviewed populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
